q: Everything you've ever wanted is on the other side of fear.
Do what you feel in your heart to be right, for you'll be criticized anyway.
It is our attitude at the beginning of a difficult task which, more than anything else, will affect its successful outcome.
You become what you think about.
The only person you should try to be better than is the person you were yesterday.
The best preparation for tomorrow is doing your best today.
Success is the progressive realization of a worthy ideal.
If you're tired, learn to rest, not to quit.
A year from now you may wish you had started today.
You cannot swim for new horizons until you have courage to lose sight of the shore.
Nothing can dim the light that shines from within.
The only journey is the one within.
What would you do if you weren't afraid?
Try not to become a person of success, but rather try to become a person of value.
Go as far as you can see; when you get there, you'll be able to see further.
The world breaks everyone, and afterward, some are strong at the broken places.
The only thing worse than being blind is having sight but no vision.
Do not let making a living prevent you from making a life.
There are no shortcuts to any place worth going.
Success is a journey, not a destination.
Be miserable. Or motivate yourself. Whatever has to be done, it's always your choice.
You are today where your thoughts have brought you; you will be tomorrow where your thoughts take you.
Your big opportunity may be right where you are now.
The greatest mistake you can make in life is to be continually fearing you will make one.
If you can find a path with no obstacles, it probably doesn't lead anywhere.
The only limit to the height of your achievements is the reach of your dreams and your willingness to work for them.
You don't drown by falling in the water; you drown by staying there.
Never bend your head. Always hold it high. Look the world straight in the eye.
Opportunity is missed by most people because it is dressed in overalls and looks like work.
Success is liking yourself, liking what you do, and liking how you do it.
It takes courage to grow up and become who you really are.
Don't judge each day by the harvest you reap but by the seeds that you plant.
We generate fears while we sit. We overcome them by action.
You have power over your mind, not outside events. Realize this, and you will find strength.
He who has a why to live can bear almost any how.
To be tested is good. The challenged life may be the best therapist.
Do not fear failure but rather fear not trying.
You are never given a wish without also being given the power to make it true.
What lies behind you and what lies in front of you pales in comparison to what lies inside of you.
The greatest glory in living lies not in never falling, but in rising every time we fall.
If there is no wind, row.
The more difficult the victory, the greater the happiness in winning.
Success isn't overnight. It's when every day you get a little better than the day before.
Nothing is particularly hard if you divide it into small jobs.
Don't count the days. Make the days count.
A champion is someone who gets up when he can't.
You may have to fight a battle more than once to win it.
Character consists of what you do on the third and fourth tries.
Failure will never overtake me if my determination to succeed is strong enough.
The gem cannot be polished without friction, nor man perfected without trials.
Always do your best. What you plant now, you will harvest later.
There is no substitute for hard work.
If you have confidence, you have patience. Confidence, that is everything.
The difference between winning and losing is most often not quitting.
Nothing splendid has ever been achieved except by those who dared believe that something inside them was superior to circumstance.
Success is not in what you have, but who you are.
Only those who dare to fail greatly can ever achieve greatly.
Be faithful in small things because it is in them that your strength lies.
The people who are crazy enough to think they can change the world are the ones who do.
I have not failed. I've just found 10,000 ways that won't work.
Don't wish it were easier. Wish you were better.
You can't build a reputation on what you are going to do.
To dare is to lose one's footing momentarily. To not dare is to lose oneself.
Nothing in the world can take the place of persistence.
Keep your eyes on the stars, and your feet on the ground.
If you want to conquer fear, do not sit home and think about it. Go out and get busy.
The only place success comes before work is in the dictionary.
The only way of finding the limits of the possible is by going beyond them into the impossible.
I attribute my success to this: I never gave or took any excuse.
The strongest people are not those who show strength in front of us but those who win battles we know nothing about.
Do the hard jobs first. The easy jobs will take care of themselves.
The biggest adventure you can take is to live the life of your dreams.
You are enough just as you are.
The sun himself is weak when he first rises and gathers strength and courage as the day gets on.
Act without expectation.
Sometimes adversity is what you need to face in order to become successful.
The difference between the difficult and the impossible is that the impossible takes a little longer.
If you're going through a storm, keep going.
Success is achieved and maintained by those who try and keep trying.
The brave man is not he who does not feel afraid, but he who conquers that fear.
The greater part of our happiness or misery depends upon our dispositions, and not upon our circumstances.
One can choose to go back toward safety or forward toward growth.
It is never crowded along the extra mile.
Your life does not get better by chance, it gets better by change.
The only disability in life is a bad attitude.
Begin anywhere.
We can do anything we want if we stick to it long enough.
The most effective way to do it, is to do it.
It's not whether you get knocked down, it's whether you get up.
If you want light to come into your life, you need to stand where it is shining.
Every noble work is at first impossible.
Don't let yesterday take up too much of today.
If you have dreams, don't let anyone take them away.
The first step toward success is taken when you refuse to be a captive of the environment in which you first find yourself.
The secret of success is constancy to purpose.
You don't have to see the whole staircase, just take the first step.
When written in Chinese, the word crisis is composed of two characters. One represents danger and the other represents opportunity.
Great things are done by a series of small things brought together.
Every day may not be good, but there is something good in every day.
If you can dream it, you can achieve it.
Never let your memories be greater than your dreams.
Make each day your masterpiece.
There is little success where there is little laughter.
We are what we repeatedly do. Excellence, then, is not an act but a habit.
Be not afraid of going slowly, be afraid only of standing still.
Today is your opportunity to build the tomorrow you want.
The comeback is always stronger than the setback.
The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
It always seems impossible until it's done.
Success is not final, failure is not fatal: it is the courage to continue that counts.
Believe you can and you're halfway there.
Our greatest glory is not in never falling, but in rising every time we fall.
The future depends on what you do today.
The journey of a thousand miles begins with one step.
Do what you can, with what you have, where you are.
You miss 100% of the shots you don't take.
Start where you are. Use what you have. Do what you can.
It does not matter how slowly you go as long as you do not stop.
Success is walking from failure to failure with no loss of enthusiasm.
The harder the conflict, the greater the triumph.
The best way out is always through.
Act as if what you do makes a difference. It does.
Perseverance is not a long race; it is many short races one after the other.
Energy and persistence conquer all things.
Fall seven times and stand up eight.
Don't watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
The secret of getting ahead is getting started.
With the new day comes new strength and new thoughts.
You are never too old to set another goal or to dream a new dream.
If you're going through hell, keep going.
Courage doesn't always roar. Sometimes courage is the quiet voice at the end of the day saying, 'I will try again tomorrow.'
The only limit to our realization of tomorrow will be our doubts of today.
Dream big and dare to fail.
Failure is simply the opportunity to begin again, this time more intelligently.
The difference between the impossible and the possible lies in a person's determination.
Strength does not come from physical capacity. It comes from an indomitable will.
The greatest oak was once a little nut who held its ground.
You just can't beat the person who never gives up.
Keep your face always toward the sunshine, and shadows will fall behind you.
Either you run the day or the day runs you.
Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.
Do not wait to strike till the iron is hot; but make it hot by striking.
The man who moves a mountain begins by carrying away small stones.
Small deeds done are better than great deeds planned.
A river cuts through rock not because of its power, but because of its persistence.
Great works are performed not by strength but by perseverance.
Never confuse a single defeat with a final defeat.
Go confidently in the direction of your dreams. Live the life you have imagined.
What lies behind us and what lies before us are tiny matters compared to what lies within us.
Nothing is impossible. The word itself says 'I'm possible!'
You gain strength, courage, and confidence by every experience in which you really stop to look fear in the face.
It is never too late to be what you might have been.
Hardships often prepare ordinary people for an extraordinary destiny.
Turn your wounds into wisdom.
The only person you are destined to become is the person you decide to be.
Do one thing every day that scares you.
I can and I will. Watch me.
Perfection is not attainable, but if we chase perfection we can catch excellence.
The only place where success comes before work is in the dictionary.
If opportunity doesn't knock, build a door.
A goal is a dream with a deadline.
The best revenge is massive success.
Never, never, never give up.
Success is the sum of small efforts, repeated day in and day out.
The difference between ordinary and extraordinary is that little extra.
Keep going. Everything you need will come to you at the perfect time.
I am not a product of my circumstances. I am a product of my decisions.
What we fear doing most is usually what we most need to do.
The pain you feel today will be the strength you feel tomorrow.
Discipline is the bridge between goals and accomplishment.
Every accomplishment starts with the decision to try.
You don't have to be great to start, but you have to start to be great.
When you feel like quitting, think about why you started.
If you can dream it, you can do it.
Tough times never last, but tough people do.
Do not let what you cannot do interfere with what you can do.
Success is getting what you want. Happiness is wanting what you get.
The only impossible journey is the one you never begin.
Don't be pushed around by the fears in your mind. Be led by the dreams in your heart.
Your present circumstances don't determine where you can go; they merely determine where you start.
Light tomorrow with today.
Success seems to be connected with action. Successful people keep moving.
Never let the fear of striking out keep you from playing the game.
The way to get started is to quit talking and begin doing.
It is hard to beat a person who never gives up.
Problems are not stop signs, they are guidelines.
Don't limit your challenges. Challenge your limits.
The only courage that matters is the kind that gets you from one moment to the next.
Believe in yourself and all that you are.
Every strike brings me closer to the next home run.
If there is no struggle, there is no progress.
The greater the obstacle, the more glory in overcoming it.
You may encounter many defeats, but you must not be defeated.
Success is how high you bounce when you hit bottom.
Perseverance is failing 19 times and succeeding the 20th.
Do not pray for an easy life, pray for the strength to endure a difficult one.
Keep going. Be all in.
Nothing will work unless you do.
Never give up on a dream just because of the time it will take to accomplish it.
The only thing standing between you and your goal is the story you keep telling yourself.
You are stronger than you think.
One day or day one. You decide.
Success is stumbling from failure to failure with no loss of enthusiasm.
Wherever you go, go with all your heart.
Hope is being able to see that there is light despite all of the darkness.
The darkest nights produce the brightest stars.
